Board configuration, drivers, system management, utilities, boot tests, firmware handling, and interrupt definitions for STM32F7 in Pebble firmware.

## Folders
- **[board](board/README.md)**: Board configuration structures, macros, and definitions for STM32F7, Robert board versions, and display settings.
- **[drivers](drivers/README.md)**: Drivers and functions for display, flash, I2C, button, debug serial, GPIO, PMIC, power, and watchdog.
- **[system](system/README.md)**: Manages boot bits, handles software failures, reads firmware from flash, and performs system resets.
- **[util](util/README.md)**: Macros, encoding and decoding functions, CRC-32 checksum calculations, delay functions, math utilities, network byte-order conversions, and size calculation macros.

## Files
- **[boot_tests.c](boot_tests.c.md)**: Tests for stuck buttons and flash memory integrity during boot.
- **[boot_tests.h](boot_tests.h.md)**: Declares functions to test if a button is stuck or if the flash is broken.
- **[firmware.h](firmware.h.md)**: Defines bootloader size and firmware base address for STM32F7 microcontroller.
- **[flash_region.h](flash_region.h.md)**: Defines flash memory regions and their sizes for the Pebble firmware platform.
- **[flash_region_def_helper.h](flash_region_def_helper.h.md)**: Defines macros and enums for managing flash memory regions, including address calculations and size checks.
- **[fw_copy.c](fw_copy.c.md)**: Handles firmware update processes, including validation, erasure, writing, and recovery operations.
- **[fw_copy.h](fw_copy.h.md)**: Functions for checking firmware updates and switching to recovery firmware mode.
- **[git_version.auto.h.in](git_version.auto.h.in.md)**: Header file for defining Git version information with placeholders for timestamp, tag, and version details.
- **[hardfault_handler.c](hardfault_handler.c.md)**: Handles hard faults by logging the error and performing a system reset or software failure reset.
- **[irq_stm32f7.def](irq_stm32f7.def.md)**: Definitions for STM32F7 interrupt request (IRQ) handlers with associated peripheral functions.
- **[main.c](main.c.md)**: Bootloader implementation for initializing hardware, managing boot states, and transitioning to firmware.
- **[pebble_errors.h](pebble_errors.h.md)**: Defines error codes for firmware and Bluetooth issues in the Pebble firmware.
- **[stm32f_flash_boot.ld](stm32f_flash_boot.ld.md)**: Linker script for STM32F microcontroller defining memory layout, stack, and section allocations.
- **[vector_table.c](vector_table.c.md)**: Defines the interrupt vector table and handlers for the Pebble firmware platform.
